positive: A mystical celestial creature, combining the elegance of a stylized peacock with the flowing silhouette of a nebula, taking flight against a deep indigo void. The creature's tail feathers are luminous, forming patterns of swirling cosmic dust and vibrant, bioluminescent teal and sapphire accents. The composition should be perfectly centered, creating a strong, iconic emblem suitable for a t-shirt print. Style: Neo-art deco combined with ethereal vaporwave aesthetics. Lighting: High contrast rim lighting emphasizing the silhouettes. Detail: Crisp line work, maximum visual pop, flat vector color blocking, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, muted colors, grainy, noise, photorealism
